query.title: Search Query
query.description: Google Maps search query, e.g. 'dentist New York'

geoTiles.title: Geo Tiles (optional)
geoTiles.description: List of queries to run separately, e.g. ['dentist Manhattan', 'dentist Brooklyn']. Use this to get more than 20 unique results.

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of no-website listings to return per query

includeSocial.title: Scrape Social Profiles
includeSocial.description: Attempt to extract email and phone from Instagram/Facebook profiles listed as the business website. Requires browser + proxy.
